text:
a student took the ELO rating system from chess 

ran it through 95,491 tennis matches over 43 years, and trained an XGBoost model that predicts winners with 85% accuracy

he tested it on the Australian Open 2025 completely outside the training data

99 out of 116 matches correct

Someone trained a swarm model on 3 years of NBA data and let it loose on Polymarket

The result: $1.49M. He didn't build a better model. He built a better crowd.

Here's how the system actually works.

He takes MiroFish - an open-source engine that simulates thousands of AI

My worst AI agent returned 218% in one week

4 AI agents. 4 sports.

each one watches its own sport with its own ML model

gave each $500. one week results:

NERVE: tennis (+540%) 
$500 → $3,200

PHANTOM: NBA (+486%) 
$500 → $2,928

FROST: hockey (+395%) 
$500 → $2,474

SIEGE:

Some guy ran 4 AI agents. 4 sports. $500 each. One week.

> NERVE (tennis): $500 → $3,200 (+540%)
> PHANTOM (NBA): $500 → $2,928 (+486%)
> FROST (hockey): $500 → $2,474 (+395%)
> SIEGE (soccer): $500 → $2,182 (+336%)

The edge? While ESPN shows you the score with a 15 second

A GUY JUST MADE $1.5 MILLION DOLLARS ON POLYMARKET WITH 4,000 FAKE HUMANS

He doesn't have insider info.
Doesn't have a better model than the others.

He has a swarm of 4,096 AI agents – analysts, bettors, oddsmakers – each with different reasoning.

They debate among themselves.

I think it’s fair to say initial testing of the new NFL AI algorithm is going well…

We have turned $50 into $366 already.

I’m working on something huge that will allow you to access the algorithms whenever you want…

Get excited. It’s a game-changer.

Student built an AI that proved it mathematically

Three lines towering above every player in 40 years of ATP data. The Big Three isn't a narrative - it's visible in the ELO curves.

He tested 4 algorithms on 43 years of tennis data:
→ Decision Tree: 74%
→ Random Forest: 76%

From 25 Years of Data to 79% Winrate on Prediction Markets

Indicators [38] 

- Moving averages: MA10, MA20, MA30
- RSI (overbought/oversold)
- MACD / MACD_Signal (trend)
- Bollinger Upper/Lower (volatility)
- Volatility 10/20/30, OBV, momentum, sentiment, insider activity, etc

another great project built on top of my football AI!

key improvements made by Mihailo Radović:

- ball position calculation
- player speed estimation
- significant processing speed optimization

↓ let's take a deeper look

March Moneyline Model

I’ve run the algorithm on all 16 First Round games tomorrow, using a number of factors.

This gives a score out of 100. The higher the score, the more confident the AI is.

Use these to build winning parlays.

NBA AI Edge 

I ask my algorithm to find the top rated props at alternate lines. 

These factor in a variety of data points, and gives a score out of 10.  The higher the score, the higher rated the prop is. 

My algorithm has gone 28-2 in the last two days on these!

It’s been a tougher run on MLB straights, 15-13 in the last 30 days. 

I’m putting the MLB algo on hold, full focus on Football. 

Football is my AI’s most profitable sport, you’ll know that if you tailed last season!

Let’s start the day with a future…

Dataset running XGBoost on a student's MacBook outperformed every neural in tennis

the model just took ELO from chess

where it ranks Magnus Carlsen at 2833

ran it through 43 years of ATP matches

it became the strongest signal in the entire model

so four algorithms ran

NBA AI Edge

I’ve asked my algorithm to find players who rate highly on alternate lines. 

This factors in a variety of data points, and punches out a score.

The higher the score, the higher rated the prop is. Good luck

Throw a zip file of data at o3 and ask it difficult ML tasks.

I asked it to "predict the outcome of a cricket game" from ball-by-ball data and it hit 90% accuracy (AUC). It even identified matches it got very wrong.

Extremely nontrivial task even for a senior data scientist.

Starting the day with some AI Edge, a ten game slate is perfect for your parlays.

These are the top rated alternate line props from my algorithm.

These factor in a variety of data points, and gives a score out of 10.  

The higher the score, the higher rated the prop is.

A guy who turned CLAWD BOT into a SPORT EXPERT that MADE $63k per WEEK

But how?

He used a bot that does what no human can do manually:
- Scans injury & lineup reports 28 min before tip-off
- Checks back to back game schedules
- Steam moves detection
- Cross references 12

Model Tracking Update 

Here are our updated lifetime tracking numbers for all of our models  

 Once again our basketball models have been absolutely on fire - with our NBA model going 156/197 (79.3%) over the last 26 slates and our NCAA model going 38/48 (79.2%) on MLs

Biomed AI can gain even more from weak supervision + routine data.

e.g. ChronoCon learns from visit order alone, then hits ICC 0.86 in RA scoring with just 5 patients.

Timestamps, trajectories, and care workflows are becoming the new training signal
